# Changelog

This page records notable changes to the Vault User Guide.

## 2026-07-07

- Added the RHEL local account password rotation use case, covering the OS secrets engine as a governance pattern for long-lived local accounts (incorporated from hvd-docs PR #385).

## 2026-07-06

- Restructured legacy Vault HVD content into the HVD 2.0 Vault User Guide as part of the Installation / Administration / User guide migration.
